name: oiloil-ui-ux-guide
description: Run a structured UI/UX consultation to either (a) co-design a project-specific design system and emit `design-spec.md`, (b) review an existing UI with prioritized fixes, or (c) emit compact do/don't rules for a surface. Triggers when the user wants to define / build / refine a design system or design tokens, asks for a design spec, asks for a full UI review of a screen / mockup / PR, or wants design rules for a surface type. Do NOT trigger for narrow one-off questions ("is this color OK?", "shou
author: oil-oil
summary_zh: 这是一个结构化的界面设计咨询工具，能帮你从零搭建项目设计系统并输出规范，或全面审查现有界面给出优化建议。当你需要构建、完善设计系统，或对界面做全面审查时非常适用。
